narrative:
Hanover Twp 1 (precinct in Butler County) has 238 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
